query:
SELECT awayTeam, homeTeam, bookTotal, modelTotal,
  ABS(CAST(modelTotal AS DECIMAL(10,2)) - CAST(bookTotal AS DECIMAL(10,2))) as diff
FROM games 
WHERE gameDate='2026-05-09' AND sport='MLB'
  AND bookTotal IS NOT NULL AND modelTotal IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY diff DESC;
